titles.ar: بَابٌ فِي ظُلْمَةِ قَلْبِ الْمُنَافِقِ وَ إِنْ أُعْطِيَ اللِّسَانَ وَ نُورِ قَلْبِ الْمُؤْمِنِ وَ إِنْ قَصَرَ بِهِ لِسَانُهُ
titles.en: Chapter 185 – Regarding the darkness of the ‘الْقَلْبُ’ (Qalb) of the hypocrite and even though he has been given the tongue, and radiance of the الْقَلْبُ (Qalb) of the Momin and even though he falls short with his tongue
